creator: deepbluemistake@gmail.com
text:
https://www.freebsd.org/news/status/report-2019-07-2019-09.html#TPM2-Software-Stack-(TSS2)
securtity/tpm2-tss
should be:
security/tpm2-tss

Unrelatedly, there are formatting issues where some newlines for subsection headers weren't preserved:
https://www.freebsd.org/news/status/report-2019-07-2019-09.html#FreeBSD-Foundation
For example:
"OS Improvements The Foundation supports..."
should be:
"OS Improvements
The Foundation supports..."
or at least:
"OS Improvements: The Foundation supports..."
